'''samojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadministrator|coadministrator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadministrator|coadministrator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| samojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæmejeth|sæmejeth]] || [[word:sæmejej|sæmejej]] || [[word:sæmejesh|sæmejesh]] || [[word:sæmeje|sæmeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:samomojoth|samomojoth]] || [[word:samomojoj|samomojoj]] || [[word:samomojosh|samomojosh]] || [[word:samomojo|samomojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:samojoth|samojoth]] || [[word:samojoj|samojoj]] || [[word:samojosh|samojosh]] || [[word:samojo|samojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:samofjoth|samofjoth]] || [[word:samofjoj|samofjoj]] || [[word:samofjosh|samofjosh]] || [[word:samofjof|samofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:samojotho|samojotho]] || [[word:samojojo|samojojo]] || [[word:samojosho|samojosho]] || [[word:samojoko|samojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:samojoth|samojoth]] || [[word:samojoj|samojoj]] || [[word:samojosh|samojosh]] || [[word:samojo|samojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:samojothol|samojothol]] || [[word:samojojol|samojojol]] || [[word:samojoshol|samojoshol]] || [[word:samojokol|samojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:samojothotho|samojothotho]] || [[word:samojojojo|samojojojo]] || [[word:samojoshosho|samojoshosho]] || [[word:samojoko|samojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:samojothon|samojothon]] || [[word:samojojon|samojojon]] || [[word:samojoshon|samojoshon]] || [[word:samojokon|samojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:samojothoro|samojothoro]] || [[word:samojojoro|samojojoro]] || [[word:samojoshoro|samojoshoro]] || [[word:samojokoro|samojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
